prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild warehouse, Mira Ledgerfall in a tailored navy cloak with gold trim and Ari Emberlane in a cropped travel jacket; Mira kneels on the wooden floor, pointing at spilled healing potion vials, looking up at Ari with an organized, authoritative expression.
